name: YY Bank - Custody & Cash Accounts
prompt:
This is a Standard Settlement Instruction (SSI) document from YY Bank covering custody and cash account details. The document has multiple pages:
- First page: account number and date at the top
- Securities/custody table: markets, sub-custodian details, securities accounts, security types, depository info, participant IDs, and settlement places
- Cash accounts table (possibly on another page): account locations, bank names, currencies, correspondent bank details, SWIFT BICs, IBANs, and ABA/Fedwire numbers

Extract all rows from each table completely. Pay attention to the account number at the top which is different from securities account numbers in the table.

sections.name: header
sections.description: Top of document with account-level information

sections.name: securities_accounts
sections.description: Table with custody and securities account details per market

sections.name: cash_accounts
sections.description: Table with cash account and correspondent bank details
